seo.title: Intelligent CRM Solution | AInspiration
seo.description: Transform your client relationships with our next-generation CRM. Intelligent automation, 360° view of your clients and proven conversion increases.
seo.keywords: CRM, client relationship management, sales pipeline, automation, CRM software

hero.title: Transform every interaction into a growth opportunity
hero.description: Our intelligent CRM unifies your data, automates your processes and reveals the insights that make the difference.

page.trustedBy: They trust us for their client relationship management

features.sectionTitle: A complete CRM for every aspect of your client relationships
features.sectionDescription: Discover how our solution transforms your commercial approach and retains your clients

items.title: Contact management
items.description: Centralise all your client data in one place. Track the full history, preferences and interactions for a 360° view.

items.title: Sales pipeline
items.description: Visualise and effectively manage your sales process. Track your prospects and opportunities from prospecting to close.

items.title: Task and calendar management
items.description: Never miss an important deadline. Plan and track your appointments, tasks and reminders in sync with your team.

items.title: Omnichannel communication
items.description: Manage all your communication channels from a single interface: emails, SMS, calls and social media.

items.title: Document management
items.description: Store and share all your commercial documents easily: quotes, contracts, invoices and presentations.

items.title: Reports and dashboards
items.description: Make informed decisions with visual analyses of your commercial activities and team performance.

screenshots.sectionDescription: Clean interface, smooth navigation and advanced customisation for rapid adoption

keyBenefits.sectionDescription: Our CRM offers a fast and significant return on investment

items.title: Conversion rate increase
items.description: From qualified prospects to close, optimise every step of your client journey.

items.title: Productivity gain
items.description: Free up precious time by automating your repetitive tasks and focus on client relationships.

items.title: Reduction in operating costs
items.description: Optimise your processes and reduce manual errors for a fast, measurable ROI.

items.title: Improvement in client satisfaction
items.description: Offer a personalised experience that retains your clients and generates recommendations.

testimonials.sectionDescription: Discover how our CRM has transformed our clients' activities

items.quote: AInspiration's CRM has revolutionised our commercial approach. Our teams are more responsive and our conversion rate increased by 32% in just 3 months.
items.name: Marie Dupont

items.quote: Implementation was fast and the support was exceptional. Our return on investment was achieved in less than 6 months thanks to increased sales and process optimisation.
items.name: Thomas Lefebvre

items.quote: The 360° view of our clients finally allows us to offer a truly personalised experience to each of our 10,000+ clients. An indispensable tool for our growth.
items.name: Sophie Moreau

pricing.sectionDescription: Flexible solutions that grow with your business

faq.sectionDescription: Everything you need to know about our CRM solution

items.question: How long does it take to implement your CRM solution?
items.answer: Our CRM solution can be set up in 2 to 4 weeks depending on the complexity of your organisation. We offer complete support including data migration, configuration according to your processes, and team training to ensure rapid and effective adoption.

items.question: Is your CRM compatible with our existing tools?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our CRM integrates natively with over 150 tools (Office 365, Gmail, Outlook, Mailchimp, etc.) and has an open API for custom integrations. We designed our solution to adapt to your technology ecosystem, not the other way around.

items.question: How do you guarantee the security of our data?
items.answer: Security is our absolute priority. We use end-to-end encryption, ISO 27001-compliant data centres, daily backups, and granular access controls. Our solution is fully GDPR compliant and our processes are regularly audited by independent experts.

items.question: What is the pricing for your CRM solution?
items.answer: Our pricing is transparent and modular, starting at €29/user/month for the Essential package. We also offer Business (€49) and Enterprise (bespoke) plans depending on your needs. All our plans include support and updates, with no hidden fees. Contact us for a personalised quote.

items.question: Do you offer training for our team?
items.answer: Yes, every deployment includes a training programme adapted to your needs. We offer individual or group sessions, webinars, complete documentation, and an online resource centre. Our success managers team also supports you after deployment to maximise your use of the CRM.

items.question: Can I try your CRM before committing?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer a personalised demo followed by a 14-day free trial with access to all features. You can also request a proof of concept (POC) to test the solution in your specific environment before any commitment.

deployProcess.sectionDescription: Our proven methodology guarantees a successful implementation

steps.title: Audit and analysis
steps.description: In-depth understanding of your current processes and commercial objectives.

steps.title: Configuration
steps.description: Personalisation of the solution according to your processes and integration with your tools.

steps.title: Training
steps.description: Complete training of your teams for rapid and effective adoption.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: Continuous support and regular optimisations to maximise your ROI.

cta.title: Ready to transform your client relationships?
cta.description: Join over 1,200 businesses that have already revolutionised their commercial approach with our CRM solution.
